text: Ain't nothin' like a good ol' goblin hunt!
subject: Goblin

text: Ain't no rest for the wicked, little fella!
subject: Kobold

text: That's how ya squash a bug, y'all!
subject: Giant Centipede

text: Reckon that critter won't be botherin' us no more!
subject: Kobold

text: Ain't no mountain too high for a well-placed arrow!
subject: Ogre

text: Ain't nothin' like a clean kill — that bull ain't got a leg to stand on now!
subject: Minotaur
